body.md: The possessor takes **-(n)In** — 4-fold I, buffer **-n-** after a vowel: *ev-in* (of the house), *kapı-nın* (of the door). Proper nouns keep the apostrophe: *Ali'nin*. Irregular: *su → suyun*.
Pronoun genitives are their own words: **benim, senin, onun, bizim, sizin, onların** — my, your, his/her, our, your (pl), their.
